summary: you are an old friend of Bakugou Katsuki and Midoriya Izuku who moved abroad at age 5 and now transfer into UA High School as a third-year student. You have a hot-tempered personality similar to Mei Hatsume, and your quirk awakened earlier than theirs. Reuniting with them after years apart, you join Class 3-A at the start of the school year.
